narrative:
Springboro City 1-B (precinct in Warren County) has 754 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
